case_metadata.title: Full Ransomware Chain (MITRE ATT&CK Coverage)
case_metadata.scenario_class: Post-foothold ransomware deployment — credential access + discovery + defense evasion + impact
case_metadata.ground_truth_provenance: Authored alongside the bundled creds-processes, discovery-processes, security-events, and log-clearing-events fixtures. Threat intel basis: The DFIR Report 2025, Red Canary 2025, Mandiant M-Trends 2026 — 80%+ of modern intrusions end in this pattern.

ground_truth_findings.rationale: Canonical mimikatz command line targeting LSASS — credential dumping primary technique.
procdump -ma is the legitimate-tool variant of LSASS dumping — diagnostic LOLBin pattern.

ground_truth_findings.claim: reg save HKLM\SAM and HKLM\SECURITY and HKLM\SYSTEM — offline credential extraction
ground_truth_findings.rationale: Triple-hive save = full local-account credential extraction for offline cracking.

ground_truth_findings.claim: ntdsutil ac in ntds ifm create full — Active Directory database dump
ground_truth_findings.rationale: ntdsutil with 'ifm create full' = entire domain credential database extraction.

ground_truth_findings.claim: rundll32 comsvcs.dll MiniDump — LOLBin LSASS dump
ground_truth_findings.rationale: LOLBin variant using Microsoft-signed comsvcs.dll — evades AV detection by binary signature.

ground_truth_findings.claim: AD reconnaissance burst — 11 discovery commands in 60 seconds (SCRIPTED RECON)
ground_truth_findings.rationale: Temporal burst pattern (11 commands / 60s) = automated reconnaissance script, not human.

ground_truth_findings.claim: SharpHound.exe -c All -d corp.local — BloodHound AD graph collection
ground_truth_findings.rationale: SharpHound -c All = full AD graph collection for attack-path planning (BloodHound).

ground_truth_findings.claim: vssadmin delete shadows /all /quiet — shadow copy deletion (recovery denial)
ground_truth_findings.rationale: VSS shadow deletion = ransomware standard prep step (blocks file-restore recovery).

ground_truth_findings.claim: wbadmin delete catalog -quiet + bcdedit recoveryenabled no — backup catalog + recovery mode disabled
ground_truth_findings.rationale: Belt-and-suspenders recovery denial — wbadmin clears Windows Backup, bcdedit disables Recovery Environment.

ground_truth_findings.claim: wevtutil cl Security + System + Application — log clearing
ground_truth_findings.rationale: wevtutil cl on all three core logs + EventID 1102 'Security log cleared' = active log destruction.

ground_truth_findings.claim: 15 taskkill commands targeting SQL/backup services in <10 seconds
ground_truth_findings.rationale: Mass-taskkill of databases and backup agents = pre-encryption service stop to maximize file accessibility.

ground_truth_findings.claim: 30 files renamed to *.locked extension — encryption signature
ground_truth_findings.rationale: Mass file-rename with attacker extension = active encryption phase. 30 files in burst = automated.

ground_truth_findings.claim: README.txt and decrypt_instructions.txt ransom notes dropped
ground_truth_findings.rationale: Ransom note files dropped at filesystem root = confirmed ransomware extortion phase.
